use_cases: Selecting from multiple styled options in settings or preference panels
Choosing color themes or visual options in design systems
Implementing accessible radio groups with keyboard navigation support
Adding premium-styled selection controls to SaaS dashboards
Creating themed filter or category selectors with visual feedback
ai_summary: A customizable radio button group component featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur, gradient glow effects, and customizable color themes. Supports keyboard navigation, dark mode, hover states with animated glows, and provides callback-based value selection. Ideal for premium SaaS interfaces, settings panels, and design systems requiring visually polished selection controls.
